title: crepis pulchra subsp. pulchra
intro: Crepis pulchra subsp. pulchra, also known as the pretty hawk's beard, is a biennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Crepis pulchra subsp. pulchra include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Crepis pulchra subsp. pulchra can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
